_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of target and threat organization structures, critical capabilities, and critical vulnerabilities.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI-specific attack taxonomy, including adversarial examples, model evasion, model extraction, model inversion, membership inference, data poisoning, and prompt injection.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-012 (SP, cosine: 0.550), AG-K-003 (AG, cosine: 0.532).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.513). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [capabilities, critical, organization, structures, target, threat] vs WIDAI-only terms [adversarial, ai, attack, data, evasion, examples] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.889, R=0.851). P exceeds R by 0.038 — the DCWF element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (95.5%). "Knowledge of target and threat organization structures, critical capabilities, a" and "Knowledge of AI-specific attack taxonomy, including adversarial examples, model" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.553 ≈ STS 0.513 (gap 0.040). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [capabilities, critical, organization, structures, target, threat]. WIDAI-only: [adversarial, ai, attack, data, evasion, examples].

signals.detail: STS 0.513 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
